commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Maintainers need to review the proof-positive cache-trim PR together with or after its open base; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.; Cleared: The diff adds local cache cleanup, DEBUG-only proof plumbing, logging, and tests without new dependencies, downloaded code, credential handling, permission changes, or supply-chain surface. (sha=e7089f10471797c8f67e0a9a0960034dd78a3282)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds macOS memory-pressure handling that evicts idle OpenAI WebViews, trims rebuildable menu/debug caches, logs trim counts, and adds DEBUG proof hooks plus focused tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a performance/resource-management PR rather than a deterministic broken-behavior report. The contributor supplied built-app unified logs for the simulated memory-pressure path, and focused tests exercise the cache-trim boundaries.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to review the proof-positive cache-trim PR together with or after its open base; there is no narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: Trim app caches on memory pressure
target.body:
## Summary

Trims rebuildable app caches when the existing memory-pressure monitor fires.

This is stacked on #1575. The branch has been restacked on #1575 head `b2854cbb`, so the incremental app-cache diff sits above the WebView memory-pressure base.

## What changed

- Adds a memory-pressure cache trim callback to `MemoryPressureMonitor`.
- Wires `AppDelegate` into that callback so pressure handling also trims app-level caches.
- Clears rebuildable menu sizing/content caches and the transient menu-card recycle pool.
- Clears the OpenAI web debug ring buffer while leaving provider/session/auth/refresh state intact.
- Logs trim counts when anything was released.
- Reuses the DEBUG-only distributed notification proof hook from #1575 so a local debug app can simulate the memory-pressure path and emit runtime before/after logs without changing release behavior.

## Why

Low-memory machines benefit from releasing cached UI/debug data as soon as macOS reports memory pressure. These caches are local and rebuildable, so trimming them does not force provider probes, drop credentials, cancel refreshes, or clear usage snapshots.

## Proof

- Restacked on #1575 and runtime-tested at head `e7089f10`.
- Built debug executable launched from `/Users/alec/Dev/CodexBar/.build/debug/CodexBar`, then triggered with:

```sh
/usr/bin/swift -e 'import Foundation; DistributedNotificationCenter.default().postNotificationName(Notification.Name("com.steipete.codexbar.debug.simulateMemoryPressure"), object: nil, userInfo: ["level": "warning", "seedCaches": "1"], deliverImmediately: true)'\n```\n\n- Unified log proof from the running built process:\n\n```text\n2026-06-16 11:36:27.053 I  CodexBar[16607:14c2ffe] [com.steipete.codexbar:memory-pressure] Debug memory pressure notification received (level=warning seedCaches=1)\n2026-06-16 11:36:27.053 E  CodexBar[16607:14c2ffe] [com.steipete.codexbar:memory-pressure] System memory pressure (level=warning)\n2026-06-16 11:36:27.054 I  CodexBar[16607:14c2ffe] [com.steipete.codexbar:memory-pressure] Memory pressure OpenAI webview cache (after=1 before=2 evicted=1)\n2026-06-16 11:36:27.054 I  CodexBar[16607:14c2ffe] [com.steipete.codexbar:memory-pressure] Trimmed app caches for memory pressure (menuCardHeights=1 menuWidths=1 mergedSwitcherSelections=2 openAIWebDebugLines=2 recycledMenuCardViews=1 total=7)\n```\n\n- `swift test --filter MemoryPressureCacheTrimTests`: 3 tests passed after 0.273 seconds. Proves the monitor invokes the app trim handler and preserves refresh/auth/session state while clearing rebuildable caches.\n- `swift test --filter OpenAIDashboardWebViewCacheTests`: 19 tests passed after 2.966 seconds. Reconfirms the same memory-pressure path evicts idle shared WebViews without interrupting busy WebViews.\n- `swift build --build-tests`: passed.\n- `swiftlint --strict`: 0 violations, 0 serious in 1141 files.\n- `swiftformat Sources/CodexBar/Notifications+CodexBar.swift Sources/CodexBar/CodexbarApp.swift Sources/CodexBar/MemoryPressureMonitor.swift Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController+MemoryPressure.swift Sources/CodexBar/StatusItemController.swift Sources/CodexBar/UsageStore+MemoryPressure.swift`: passed.\n- `git diff --check`: passed.\n
target.author: prospectore

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
